definition_hi: Subject के बारे में जो कुछ कहा जाए, उसे predicate कहते हैं।
title: What is a Sentence? (वाक्य क्या है?)
classroom_explanation:
Sentence ऐसा group होता है जो:
पूरी बात बताए
clear meaning दे
समझ में आए
अगर बात अधूरी है, तो वह proper sentence नहीं माना जाता।

categories.name: Example
categories.intro:
“She is reading.”
यह sentence है क्योंकि:
इसमें complete meaning है
पूरी बात समझ में आ रही है

categories.name: Incomplete Example
categories.intro:
“Going to school”
यह complete sentence नहीं है क्योंकि:
कौन जा रहा है?
यह clear नहीं है

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro:
हर sentence में सामान्यतः:
कोई subject होता है और
उसके बारे में कुछ बताया जाता है
इसीलिए sentence complete लगता है।

categories.name: Sentence vs Word
categories.intro:
Word
BOOK
RUN
WATER
ये सिर्फ single meanings हैं।

categories.name: Sentence
categories.intro:
“I drink water.”
यह complete idea दे रहा है।

categories.name: Main Purpose of a Sentence
categories.intro:
Sentence का काम है:
information देना
question पूछना
feeling express करना
command देना

categories.name: Types of Meaning in Sentences (Basic Awareness)
categories.intro:
Sentence:
statement हो सकता है
question हो सकता है
command हो सकता है
exclamation हो सकता है
आगे इन्हें detail में पढ़ेंगे।

categories.name: One More Example
categories.intro:
“Open the door.”
यह भी sentence है क्योंकि इसमें complete instruction है।

categories.name: Common Mistake
categories.intro:
कुछ students: अधूरे phrase को sentence समझ लेते हैं।
Example:
“Playing cricket”
यह complete sentence नहीं है।
लेकिन:
“They are playing cricket.”
यह complete sentence है।

categories.name: Why This Topic is Important
categories.intro:
अगर student sentence properly समझ ले, तो:
grammar learning आसान होती है
speaking improve होती है
translation आसान होता है
tense समझना आसान होता है

categories.name: Small Advanced Awareness
categories.intro:
हर sentence सिर्फ words का group नहीं होता।
उसमें:
structure
order
meaning
grammar relation
भी होता है।

categories.name: Tiny Practice
categories.intro:
बताइए कौन-सा proper sentence है?
1. Reading a book
2. He is reading a book.
3. Playing outside
4. They are playing outside.
Topic 14A — Sentence Structure Basics
(वाक्य की मूल संरचना)
Teacher Introduction
बच्चों, अब तक हमने:
words
sounds
pronunciation
sentence
समझा।
अब हम sentence के अंदर की structure समझेंगे।
हर sentence सिर्फ words का group नहीं होता।
उसके अंदर अलग-अलग parts मिलकर complete meaning बनाते हैं।
अगर यह topic अच्छे से समझ में आ जाए, तो आगे:
tense
translation
narration
spoken English
complex sentence
बहुत आसान हो जाते हैं।

categories.name: Building Block Concept
categories.intro:
Phrase, Clause और Sentence — तीनों word groups हैं।
लेकिन तीनों का काम अलग होता है।

categories.name: Phrase
categories.intro:
→ incomplete meaning group
Clause
→ subject + verb group
Sentence
→ complete communication

categories.name: 1. Phrase (फ्रेज)
categories.intro:
English Definition
A phrase is a group of words that does not express a complete thought.

categories.name: Simple Understanding
categories.intro: Phrase में कुछ meaning होता है, लेकिन पूरी बात नहीं होती।

categories.name: Examples
categories.intro:
in the room
→ कमरे में

categories.name: after the match
categories.intro: → मैच के बाद

categories.name: a beautiful girl
categories.intro: → एक सुंदर लड़की

categories.name: very slowly
categories.intro: → बहुत धीरे

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro:
Phrase:
sentence का part हो सकता है
लेकिन खुद पूरा sentence नहीं होता

categories.name: 2. Clause (उपवाक्य)
categories.intro:
English Definition
A clause is a group of words that has its own subject and its own verb.

categories.name: Simple Understanding
categories.intro:
Clause phrase से ज्यादा powerful होता है क्योंकि इसमें:
subject और
verb
दोनों होते हैं।

categories.name: Examples
categories.intro:
she is singing
→ वह गा रही है
subject = she
verb = is singing

categories.name: because he was ill
categories.intro:
→ क्योंकि वह बीमार था
subject = he
verb = was

categories.name: when the bell rang
categories.intro:
→ जब घंटी बजी
subject = bell
verb = rang

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro:
हर clause complete sentence नहीं होता।
कुछ clauses अकेले complete meaning नहीं देते।

categories.name: Types of Clause (Basic Awareness)
categories.intro:
Independent Clause
जो अकेले पूरा meaning दे सके।
Example:
She is reading.
→ वह पढ़ रही है।

categories.name: Dependent Clause
categories.intro:
जो अकेले पूरा meaning न दे।
Example:
because she was tired
→ क्योंकि वह थकी हुई थी

categories.name: 3. Sentence (वाक्य)
categories.intro:
English Definition
A sentence is a group of words that expresses a complete thought.

categories.name: Simple Understanding
categories.intro: Sentence सुनने के बाद लगता है: “हाँ, बात पूरी हो गई।”

categories.name: Examples
categories.intro:
She is reading a book.
→ वह एक किताब पढ़ रही है।

categories.name: The boys are playing football.
categories.intro: → लड़के फुटबॉल खेल रहे हैं।

categories.name: I went home after school ended.
categories.intro: → स्कूल समाप्त होने के बाद मैं घर गया।

categories.name: Most Important Difference
categories.intro:
FeaturePhraseClauseSentence
Word GroupYesYesYes
SubjectUsually NoYesYes
VerbUsually No finite verbYesYes
Complete ThoughtNoSometimesYes
Can Stand AloneNoSometimesYes

categories.name: One Powerful Example
categories.intro:
Phrase
after school
→ स्कूल के बाद

categories.name: Clause
categories.intro:
after school ended
→ स्कूल समाप्त होने के बाद

categories.name: Sentence
categories.intro:
I went home after school ended.
→ स्कूल समाप्त होने के बाद मैं घर गया।

categories.name: Subject (कर्ता)
categories.intro:
English Definition
The subject is the part about which something is said.

categories.name: Examples
categories.intro:
Rahul plays cricket.
Subject: Rahul

categories.name: The birds are flying.
categories.intro: Subject: The birds

categories.name: Predicate (विधेय)
categories.intro:
English Definition
The predicate tells something about the subject.

categories.name: Examples
categories.intro:
Rahul plays cricket.
Predicate: plays cricket

categories.name: The birds are flying.
categories.intro: Predicate: are flying

categories.name: Easy Memory Tricks
categories.intro:
Phrase
→ incomplete group
Clause
→ subject + verb group
Sentence
→ complete thought

categories.name: Common Mistake
categories.intro:
कुछ students:
हर word group को sentence समझ लेते हैं या
phrase और clause में confusion कर देते हैं।

categories.name: Why This Topic is Important
categories.intro:
अगर student:
phrase
clause
sentence
subject
predicate
अच्छे से समझ ले, तो आगे grammar बहुत आसान हो जाती है।

categories.name: Tiny Practice
categories.intro:
बताइए कौन phrase है, कौन clause है और कौन sentence:
1. after the game
2. she is dancing
3. because he was late
4. The children are studying.
Topic 14A — Sentence Structure Basics
(वाक्य की मूल संरचना)

अगर यह topic अच्छे से समझ में आ जाए, तो आगे:

subject = bell

→ incomplete group

categories.intro:
अगर student:

clause
sentence
subject
predicate
अच्छे से समझ ले, तो आगे grammar बहुत आसान हो जाती है।

categories.name: Tiny Practice
categories.intro:
बताइए कौन phrase है, कौन clause है और कौन sentence:
1. after the game
2. she is dancing
3. because he was late
4. The children are studying.
यह बहुत important confusion point है।
और यही जगह है जहाँ beginner students सबसे ज्यादा confuse होते हैं।
Best simple logic:
Relation Between Independent Clause and Sentence
हर sentence में कम-से-कम एक independent clause होता है।
और कभी-कभी: Independent clause अकेले ही पूरा sentence बन जाता है।

categories.name: सबसे आसान Formula
categories.intro:
Independent Clause = mini complete sentence
Sentence = final complete communication

categories.name: Example 1
categories.intro:
She is reading.
→ वह पढ़ रही है।
यह:
independent clause भी है
और पूरा sentence भी है
क्यों?
क्योंकि:
subject है
verb है
complete thought है

categories.name: Example 2
categories.intro:
I know that she is reading.
यहाँ:
Main Clause: I know
Subordinate Clause: that she is reading
पूरा sentence: I know that she is reading.

categories.name: Most Important Understanding
categories.intro:
हर independent clause sentence बन सकता है।
लेकिन हर sentence सिर्फ एक clause से नहीं बनता।
कुछ sentences:
एक clause से बनते हैं
कुछ multiple clauses से

categories.name: Best Beginner Logic
categories.intro:
Phrase → incomplete block
Dependent Clause → subject + verb लेकिन incomplete meaning
Independent Clause → complete mini sentence
Sentence → पूरा final message

categories.name: Easiest Memory Trick
categories.intro:
Independent clause = sentence बनने की क्षमता रखता है।
Sentence = actual complete communication unit।

teacher_note:
बच्चों, अब तक हमने words समझे।
लेकिन अकेले words हमेशा पूरा meaning नहीं देते।
जब words मिलकर एक complete idea या complete thought देते हैं, तब sentence बनता है।
यही sentence communication का सबसे important unit होता है।
definition_en: A sentence is a group of words that gives complete meaning.
